# RVS Bespoke

> RVS Bespoke (RVS Bespoke Furniture Ltd) is a family-run joinery workshop in Windsor, Berkshire, UK. We design, build, and install bespoke made-to-measure fitted furniture for homes across Windsor, Ascot, Maidenhead, Slough, Eton, Datchet, Sunningdale, Virginia Water, Wokingham, Bracknell, and the wider Berkshire area.

Workshop: 3 Riverway, Barry Ave, Windsor SL4 5JA
Phone: 07963 422797
Email: enquiries@rvsbespoke.co.uk
Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–6pm, Sat 10am–4pm, Sun by appointment

Every piece is made to measure in our Windsor workshop and installed by the same team that builds it — we never subcontract. We offer a free, no-obligation design consultation and written quote. Fitted wardrobes and bedrooms typically take four to six weeks from design sign-off to installation; kitchens and larger commissions eight to twelve weeks.

## Services

- [Living Room, Dining Room & Kitchen](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/living-room): Alcove cabinets, media walls, kitchen cabinetry, and dining room storage.
- [Fitted Bedrooms & Wardrobes](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/bedroom): Fitted wardrobes, dressing rooms, and bedroom storage.
- [Fitted Home Offices](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/home-office): Built-in desks, shelving, and office storage for working from home.
- [Loft Conversion Furniture](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/loft-conversion): Wardrobes and eaves storage for sloped ceilings and awkward loft spaces.
- [Cloakroom & Under the Stairs](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/cloakroom): Boot rooms, hallway cabinetry, and under-stair storage.

## Key pages

- [Our Work / Portfolio](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/portfolio): Photos of real completed projects.

- [Areas We Cover](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/areas): Location pages for every town we serve.
- [Contact](https://rvsbespoke.co.uk/contact): Book a free design consultation.
